title: Charge case outside screen/third screen, right zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Setup Guide charge case outside screen zoom toggles when tapping circle button on third screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Locate the Quick Setup Guide (QSG) section.
Tap on the charge case outside / third screen of the QSG.
Tap the right circle button on the screen.
Tap the same right circle button again.
expected: Tapping the right circle button zooms in and displays new text. Tapping the circle button again zooms out to the original charge case outside screen.
